prestazioni: AM28 6.0L V12 (AE31) engine: Full titanium internals upgrade with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Cosworth for 9,000 RPM redline capability. Pair with a custom dry-sump oil system by Dailey Engineering and a bespoke titanium oil pan to eliminate windage losses under lateral G-forces.

Forced induction conversion using twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers (86mm compressor wheels, 1.15 A/R turbine housings) with custom 4-inch titanium downpipes and a Tial MV-R 60mm wastegate setup. Intercooling via a PWR dual-core front-mount intercooler with 1,200 CFM airflow capacity, paired with a custom 3.5-inch silicone charge pipe system from Vibrant Performance.

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone management with individual cylinder fuel control, anti-lag system, and launch control. Supporting mods include a 12-stage nitrous oxide injection system (NOS Big Shot) with direct-port fogger nozzles, a custom 1,200cc ID1700x fuel injectors from Injector Dynamics, and a dual Bosch 044 fuel pump setup with a Radium Engineering surge tank for high-G fuel delivery.
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the Liberty Walk LB-WORKS Vantage V12 kit, including extended front fenders (30mm wider), rear quarter panels (50mm wider), and a custom carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust outlets. Front splitter and rear wing are replaced with a full carbon fiber aero package from Vorsteiner, including a 3D-printed active rear wing with Gurney flaps and DRS functionality.

Custom forged OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (20x10.5 front, 21x12.5 rear) with titanium wheel bolts and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R20 front, 325/25 R21 rear). Suspension is fully replaced with a custom KW Automotive Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilover system with remote reservoirs, titanium springs, and spherical bearing top mounts for camber adjustability.

Full interior overhaul with a bespoke roll cage from Custom Cages (T45 steel, MIG-welded), Recaro Pole Position seats with 6-point Schroth harnesses, and a custom carbon fiber dashboard with a Motec C187 digital dash display. Exterior lighting is upgraded to a full Litchfield LED conversion with sequential turn signals and a custom laser-cut titanium grille insert.
